full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: JMC bug fix and enhancement update

An update for JDK Mission Control (JMC) is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

An update for JDK Mission Control (JMC) is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Updated Packages:
jmc-8.2.0-17.el9_4.2.src.rpm
jmc-8.2.0-17.el9_4.2.x86_64.rpm

CVE-2025-66566: A flaw was found in lz4-java. This vulnerability allows disclosure of sensitive data via crafted compressed input due to insufficient clearing of the output buffer in Java-based decompressor implementations.
